title: hieracium djimilense subsp. terekianum
intro: Hieracium djimilense subsp. terekianum, also known as the Terekian Hawkweed, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Terek region of Russia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever, inflammation, and wounds, due to its high content of flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium djimilense subsp. terekianum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
